headings.usage: Headers, live stream titles, large numbers, usernames

body.usage: Chat messages, comments, descriptions, UI text

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl (24px) combined with background rgba(15,15,25,0.65) and a 1px solid border of rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Never use pure transparency for content surfaces like dropdowns or bottom sheets.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace box-shadows with glowing drop-shadows on interactive elements (e.g. drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,80,0.5)]).
visual_enhancers.motion: Use Framer Motion for all interactions. whileTap={{ scale: 0.92 }}. List staggering for chat messages and comments. Animate flying gifts across the screen using absolute positioning and spring physics.

layouts.general: Mobile-first approach. Use h-[100dvh] for viewport height to bypass iOS Safari bottom bar issues. Safe-area-inset padding for top and bottom. Hide desktop sidebar on mobile, show translucent fixed bottom navigation bar.

grids.bento_discover: Use asymmetric bento grid for Discover page (grid-cols-2 or 3, mixing col-span-2 and col-span-1 for variation).
grids.profile_videos: Strict 3-column square grid without gaps for TikTok style profile videos (grid-cols-3 gap-0.5).

accessibility.contrast: Text over video must have text-shadow or a gradient overlay underneath to ensure legibility.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="gift-send-button").

live_stream_viewer.layout: Absolute full screen (h-[100dvh] w-full). Video must cover the entire background (object-cover). Overlays sit on top.
live_stream_viewer.top_bar: Absolute top. Broadcaster profile pill (avatar + name + follow button) top left. Live viewer count pill (red bg) and 'X' close button top right. Safe-area-inset-top applied.
live_stream_viewer.chat_overlay: Absolute bottom left, width 70%. Height max 35vh. Use mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black 15%, black) to fade out older messages at the top. Messages must have no background, just text-shadow for readability over video.
live_stream_viewer.action_stack: Absolute bottom right. Vertical flex column. Contains Profile, Like, Share, and a prominent floating 'Gift' button (gold colored, glowing animation).
live_stream_viewer.input_bar: Small transparent pill input at absolute bottom left under chat. 'Spune ceva...' (Say something...).
live_stream_viewer.gift_drawer: Bottom sheet (use Framer Motion drag='y' or Shadcn Drawer). 50vh height. Dark glassmorphic background. Header shows user Coin balance in Gold. Grid of 20 gifts. 'Trimite' (Send) button fixed at bottom.

feed_page.layout: Vertical swipe snap (snap-y snap-mandatory). Each item h-[100dvh] w-full.
feed_page.controls: Right-aligned floating action stack (Avatar, Like, Comment, Bookmark, Share). Bottom-aligned description and music ticker.
feed_page.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom bar. Glassmorphic. 5 icons. Must have z-50.

image_urls.description: Neon glowing 3D gift box to be used as placeholder for the high-tier animated gifts.
Cyberpunk neon portrait, perfect for the broadcaster avatar or live stream thumbnail.

media.3d_libraries: Framer Motion 3D for simple flip/rotate interactions on gifts. Avoid heavy WebGL for the overlay to maintain stream performance.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a TikTok clone named KdM. The core task is to FIX THE MOBILE UX, specifically redesigning the Live Stream Viewer from a split-screen to a full-screen overlay experience.
The Live Stream viewer must not be 70/30 split. Make the video 100dvh absolute inset-0. Put the chat, user info, and action buttons as absolute overlays on top of the video.
Create a Bottom Sheet for the Gifts menu triggered by a floating gift icon.
Implement the Chat with a gradient mask (mask-image: linear-gradient) so messages organically fade out at the top.
Use framer-motion for micro-animations (e.g., hearts popping on double tap, gifts flying across screen, buttons scaling on tap).
All text is in Romanian. Follow the color palette exactly (#ff0050 primary, #FFD700 gold).
Write .js and .jsx files. DO NOT output TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
Ensure the layout prevents the chat from blocking the floating action buttons on the right.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Never apply 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.
Always use 'data-testid' on interactive elements for testing.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop-blur-xl and semi-transparent borders. Never use pure transparent backgrounds over content.
Use 2-3x more spacing. Cramped designs look cheap.
On mobile, bottom navigation should be fixed, and dialogs should behave as bottom sheets.
Component Reuse: Prioritize Shadcn UI patterns but customize them heavily to match the brand.
Avoid using emoji icons. Use Lucide-react or Phosphor Icons.
